3318120.name: Underway (Remastered)
3318120.description:
Seven years ago, Leo gets a request from his boss to come in to work late one night. When he gets there, his boss invites him to come up to his office. But Leo faces some obstacles trying to go upstairs, for something (or someone) is trying to stop him...

This remastering of moral-testing adventure/puzzle RPG "Underway" will give you chills in places you didn't know you could get them! With a deep and intriguing story to boot, you'll have a great time getting lost in the world and story!

Features:

-Intriguing and original story

-An upgraded game engine that runs the game much better than ever before! (At 60 FPS!!!)

-NO SOFTLOCKS (As far as we know)

-Original soundtrack with NEW songs by Charlie Martini!

-The same weird little robots

-Interesting characters (New faces?)

-A NEW map that's NOT the same floor-plan four times!

-Hidden secrets!

-A man that (still) drinks whiskey

-Code-breaking character(s)

-Death (Not by natural causes...)

-Character names that are hard to pronounce and/or maybe not words in the English language?

-Credits! (Is this how it all ends...?)
3318120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
